title: Celtic sea salt iMessage — Sundance bulk-market evangelism
html:
iMessage chat — Yahir (or a friend) gushing about grey Celtic sea salt from Sundance Natural Foods in Corvallis ("saved my life… many meals, many conversations… has natural electrolytes"); reply asks "what about this is celtic". Adjacent to supplement stack / mineral-as-meaning ritualism.

sundance natural foods · corvallis or · supplement stack · brotein
